originalTitle: Kenyan Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history in London
title: Kenyan Sawe smashes two-hour barrier to make history in London
content: Sabastian Sawe makes history at the London Marathon as the first person to run a sub-two-hour marathon in a competitive race.

originalTitle: The detained anti-colonial activist grabbing attention in West Africa: Who is Kemi Seba?
title: The detained anti-colonial activist grabbing attention in West Africa: Who is Kemi Seba?
content: The activist has condemned France's influence in West Africa and been accused of being a "Russian mouthpiece".

originalTitle: Armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
title: Armed groups launch coordinated attacks across Mali
content: Witnesses report clashes in the centre and north, in what has been described as the largest jihadist attack in years.

originalTitle: What lies ahead for Gaza after ceasefires in Iran and Lebanon?
title: What lies ahead for Gaza after ceasefires in Iran and Lebanon?
content: Regional de-escalation may shift focus to Gaza, where deadlock over Hamas weapons, future governance threatens 'truce'.

originalTitle: Syria puts first Assad-era official on trial in Damascus
title: Syria puts first Assad-era official on trial in Damascus
content: Atef Najib, ex-head of political security in Deraa province, is charged with 'crimes against the Syrian people'.

originalTitle: Sebastian Sawe breaks London marathon record with first run under two hours
title: Sebastian Sawe breaks London marathon record with first run under two hours
content: Kenyan athlete breaks Kelvin Kiptum’s previous world record of 2:00:35; Ethiopia's Assefa retains her women's crown.

originalTitle: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
title: I was in the room with Trump and heard the low thudding sound of gunfire
content: The BBC's Gary O'Donoghue describes the moment he and others dived for cover as shots rang out at the venue.

originalTitle: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
content: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

originalTitle: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
title: Netanyahu orders army to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah in Lebanon
content: The Israeli PM's directive comes as six people were killed by strikes in Lebanon despite a ceasefire being extended by three weeks.

originalTitle: Why Rashford must be patient over Barcelona future
title: Why Rashford must be patient over Barcelona future
content: Marcus Rashford is not ready to give up on his Barcelona dream just yet, writes Spanish football expert Guillem Balague.

originalTitle: A long time coming but something to build on - Isak's landmark goal
title: A long time coming but something to build on - Isak's landmark goal
content: Will Alexander Isak's first Liverpool Premier League goal at Anfield prove a turning point for the £125m signing?

title: 'It's not done' - Arsenal back up Rice's words with crucial win
content: Arsenal deliver on Declan Rice's promise that the Premier League title race is "not done" with an important win over Newcastle.
